# show / get behaviour. Reference jobs by name since IDs are random.

exec eon add --cron '@hourly' --name x -- echo hi

# Text view.
exec eon show x
stdout 'kind: +cron'
stdout 'name: +x'

# JSON view.
exec eon show x --json
stdout '"id": "[0-9A-Za-z]+"'

# Aliases.
exec eon get x --json
stdout '"id": "[0-9A-Za-z]+"'

# Unknown name → exit 3 (not found).
! exec eon show nope
stderr 'not found'

# Unknown 5-char ID → exit 3.
! exec eon show abcde
stderr 'not found'

# Bad shorthand → exit 2 (cobra usage).
! exec eon show -1

# show requires exactly one positional → exit 2.
! exec eon show
! exec eon show x extra
